'''Sperin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GG11" /> in the [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], near the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]].<ref name="EAOC" />

It was the secret headquarters of the [[Natori Association]]<ref name="GG11" /><ref name="SE" /><ref name="JC15" />, which was a regional agency of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]].<ref name="SE" /> Worked from a base on Sperin, the Natori Association constituted a loose collective of ex-military personnel who banded together to train [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] for hire.<ref name="GG11" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], this company had a large proportion of non-[[Human/Legends|humans]] in its ranks, making it a suspicious entity in the eyes of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but the company was tolerated since it had not yet come into conflict with Imperial forces in a significant way. Unlike other elements of the Tenloss Syndicate, Natori maintained neutrality toward the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] in an attempt to keep the Imperials from focusing attention on the Association.<ref name="SE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sperin was introduced in the ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' sourcebook {{C|[[1994]]}} for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. In this source, as in the subsequent ones, the physical description of the planet Sperin was never considered, and everywhere it was mentioned only as the location of the [[Natori Association]] base.
